project_understanding.project_summary: Node.js REST API with multiple controllers and services for managing users, payments, quizzes, sales items, scholarships, and admin functionality.
project_understanding.architecture: Express backend with various controllers and services, no frontend included.

diagrams.name: System Overview
diagrams.mermaid:
graph TD
Controller --> Service
Service --> Repository
Repository --> Database
AdminUI --> Controller
Frontend --> None

diagrams.name: Request Flow
diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart TD
A[User Request] -->|HTTP| B[API Gateway]
B --> C[Controller]
C --> D[Service]
D --> E[Database]
E --> F[Response]

diagrams.name: API Sequence
diagrams.mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
User --> Controller: User Request
Controller --> Service: Validate User
Service --> Database: Retrieve Data
Database --> Service: Return Data
Service --> Controller: Response
Controller --> User: API Response
